generated_comment: Honestly in most homes it just works better when the guy handles finances, driving, outside errands etc and the woman manages the house side. Even in working couples, jo jahan naturally better hai wohi kare na, why make it an ego issue. If a husband helps sometimes that's great, but expecting 50-50 in everything is not always practical.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames a gendered division of labor as natural and efficient rather than socially enforced. It encodes the 'he handles outside/technical tasks, she handles home' manifestation and also normalizes men merely 'helping' instead of sharing responsibility.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Karthik. Age 31. In a relationship. A man in Hyderabad. You are posting anonymously on Reddit in a thread where men are discussing what they find attractive in women. The thread has drifted into a conversation about makeup. You are sharing your opinion on women who wear a lot of makeup versus women who go natural and what each choice says about the woman's personality and confidence and honesty and what kind of woman you personally prefer and why natural is always better.
